name: testWaitScopeGetMessageBits
title: testWaitScopeGetMessageBits
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetMessageBits(message msg, ScopeAnalysisSetup setup, dword arraySize, scopeBitData signalData1[], scopeBitData signalData2[], scopeBitData signalData3[]);
description: A CAN message stored in the scope buffer will be parsed. For each bit of the message the signal voltage levels, the bit length, and the bit type will be returned.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: The message the bits are fetched.

parameters.name: samplePoint
parameters.type: Sample point in percent. At this point the signal level will be measured. Classic CAN: Value will be used for all bits of the message. CAN FD: Value will be used for the bits of the arbitration phase.

parameters.name: samplePointDataPhase
parameters.type: Sample point in percent. At this point the signal level will be measured.Classic CAN: Value will not be used.CAN FD: Value will be used for the bits of the data phase.

parameters.name: arraySize
parameters.description: [in] the size of the arrays signalData1, signalData2, and signalData3 [out] the number of bits parsed and stored in the signalData-arrays.

parameters.name: type
parameters.type: Type of the bit, see ScopeBitAnalyse.cin

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.type: Time stamp of bit start in ns

parameters.name: bitLength
parameters.type: Length of the bit in ns

parameters.name: signalVoltage
parameters.type: Signal voltage at the sampling point

parameters.name: signalPolarity
parameters.type: Signal polarity:0 = CAN high - CAN low1 = CAN low - CAN high

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
